overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks along city streets, crosses an intersection, and enters a narrower covered pedestrian area, passing futuristic vehicles, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: security guard in dark uniform walks past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the crosswalk and along the city street, passing by futuristic advertisements

notable_agents.action: security guard walking past the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with painted lines
multi-level concrete highway ramp with yellow structural accents and lighting
rotating green glowing cube displaying product advertisement on the sidewalk
tall curved building with illuminated windows and reflective glass facade
tall industrial-style street lighting with warm orange glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night, with the camera positioned at a yellow crosswalk. The player walks forward past a security guard, with an elevated highway structure visible to the left and a rotating green holographic advertisement glowing on the right. The environment features modern glass towers and sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with outdoor dining and tree planters

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing pedestrians and outdoor seating areas with white umbrellas

entered.detail: large potted trees with decorative lighting and wooden planter boxes
white canopy umbrellas over outdoor dining tables with neon accents
large illuminated orange neon sign for Dandelion Cocktails bar on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial street lined with large potted trees and outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas on the right. The Dandelion Cocktails neon sign becomes visible in the distance on the left. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the camera moves forward through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with vehicle traffic and neon signage

events.description: green sports car with neon underglow drives past from left to right through the intersection
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street toward the Dandelion Cocktails building

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians in the intersection

notable_agents.action: green sports car with underglow driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic green sports car with glowing neon underglow and sleek design
white futuristic sedan with bright illuminated headlights approaching the intersection
large circular neon sign with pink and blue lighting displaying commercial graphics

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and crosses a busy intersection where a green sports car with neon underglow passes by. The Dandelion Cocktails sign grows larger on the left as the camera crosses the striped crosswalk. A white luxury sedan waits in the center of the intersection, and a large circular neon sign glows on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with exterior stairs and digital billboards

events.description: entering narrower covered street with overhead digital billboards and reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking into a covered pedestrian area passing by metal stairs and illuminated storefronts on the right

entered.detail: external staircase with metal railings and red accents leading to upper building level
multiple suspended digital advertisement screens displaying animated content overhead
overhead structural covering providing partial shelter over the pedestrian walkway
illuminated shop windows with neon lighting and commercial displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrower, covered pedestrian walkway with overhead digital billboards and exterior metal stairs visible on the right. The environment becomes more enclosed with reduced sky visibility, featuring storefront displays with neon lighting. The elevated highway structure returns to view on the left as the camera moves deeper into the covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into a dense, enclosed pedestrian corridor. It begins at a yellow crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past a security guard and a rotating green holographic advertisement. As the camera advances, the open intersection gives way to a commercial street lined with potted trees and outdoor cafe seating, while the Dandelion Cocktails neon sign emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts across another busy intersection, passing a neon-underglow sports car and a white luxury sedan before the environment narrows. Finally, the camera enters a covered walkway beneath digital billboards and metal stairs, where the sky vanishes and the space becomes a claustrophobic urban corridor of glowing storefronts.
